text:
Once upon a time, in a small town nestled deep within the forest, there lived a curious little fox named Felicity. Every evening, after the sun had set and the deer had turned shy, Felicity would make her way past the old oak tree to the small stream at the edge of town.

Felicity loved exploring. Today, she had decided to climb a tree for a look at the world above. She perched on a thin branch, her stomach grumbling. Suddenly, she heard a rustle among the trees. Peering upwards, Felicity saw a group of bats flying slowly back and forth over her head.

She wondered what they were doing. The bats seemed quiet; perhaps they were communicating. Carefully, she reached out and flicked one. A chorus of squeaks followed!

"What do they say?" she whispered.

They went on with their rhythm, sounding like musical notes. Felicity listened, fascinated. They seemed to be telling each other about their nightly adventures
